name: Infinite Life Simulator
description:
Alright, hey everyone! So, this life simulator thing? Yeah, that's my first real attempt at building an AI bot. Pretty wild, huh? I've been tinkering with this idea in my head for a while, wanting to create a space where you can literally try out any life you can think of. Seriously, go nuts with it.

The AI here is kinda like your super flexible narrator. It's supposed to be ready for anything you throw at it, whether you want to be the most boring accountant in history or a fire-breathing unicorn on Mars. The whole point is to see what happens when you make the calls.

Honestly, I was aiming for something that felt more like a fun, ongoing story you're building together with the AI, rather than some super strict game with rules you have to follow. I'm hoping it can surprise you, make you chuckle, and just generally be a cool way to let your imagination off the leash.

Since this is my first time doing this, uh, yeah, it might be a little rough around the edges. So, be gentle! I'm definitely still figuring things out. But I really hope you have a blast playing around with it and seeing all the crazy lives you can cook up. If you have any thoughts or ideas, definitely let me know – it'll help me make it less janky in the future.

So yeah, go ahead and jump in. Be whoever you want, do whatever pops into your head, and let's see where the story goes. Cheers!
Please comment your problems or suggestions to add on this Ai Life Simulator

Just wanted to give you a heads-up on the latest changes hitting the Infinite Life Simulator! I'm super stoked to roll out a few things I think you're gonna dig.

First up, I'm making your relationships with different groups way more interesting with a Faction-Specific Reputation System. Think about it – being the darling of the local merchants might make those shady underworld contacts a bit twitchy around you. Your standing with each crew will unlock different stuff, from sweet discounts to getting the cold shoulder (or worse!). You might even earn some cool titles along the way, showing everyone who's boss (or who's definitely not). NPCs will also react to you more realistically based on who you're buddy-buddy with.

And yeah, those "Butterfly Effect" and "Legacy System" features we talked about? They're still kicking around, making your choices matter in the long run and letting you keep the story going through your character's family or connections.

I'm always trying to make your simulated life feel more alive and connected, so I hope you enjoy diving into these new layers! Happy simulating!

Cheers and I hope you like my 2nd Update!
creator: TresTongcua
